props.name: animated
props.description: Use to animate the stripes right to left via CSS3 animations.

props.name: className
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the component.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: value
props.description: The percent to progress the ProgressBar.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the progress bar variant to optional striped.
